items.name: Merit Bars
items.req: Por categoría de trabajo (Athletics, Civic Service, Fundraising, Membership, Ritual, etc.), cada una con su requisito numérico — p.ej. Civic Service: 10 hs/3 proyectos; Membership: 3 applications como first-line signer; Ritual: 125 puntos. Colores por repetición: White → Red → Blue → Purple → Gold.
items.cost: Se compran en ShopDeMolay (la de Membership la provee DI)
items.notes: Se exhibe una sola barra por categoría; al subir de color se entrega la anterior.

items.name: Lamp of Knowledge
items.req: Completar los cinco cursos del Leaders Correspondence Course (BeADeMolay.org/lcc). Cada lección además da una Merit Bar.
items.notes: El certificado del LCC se muestra al Awards Advisor para pedir cada barra.

items.name: Founder's Membership Award (FMA)
items.req: Ser first-line signer en 5 Membership Applications.
items.notes: Senior DeMolays elegibles con Majority Certificate.

items.name: Blue Honor Key
items.req: Ser first-line signer en 10 Membership Applications. Una estrella por cada 10 adicionales.
items.notes: Si no llegás antes de los 21, podés completarla como Senior DeMolay con tu certificado.

items.name: White Honor Key
items.req: Reclutar 3 nuevos Advisors registrados y designados por el Executive Officer. Estrellas por cada múltiplo de 3.

items.name: Green Honor Key
items.req: Ser first-line signer en 10 applications de Priory. Estrellas por cada múltiplo de 10.
items.notes: Para miembros activos de Priory o Senior Knights con certificado.

items.name: Pink Honor Key
items.req: Reclutamiento realizado por mujeres (jóvenes o adultas); políticas y múltiplos los define el Executive Officer.

items.name: Hats Off Award
items.req: Servicio al Chapter que los Active Members decidan reconocer por elección. No se puede solicitar.
items.by: El Chapter (voto de los Active Members)
items.notes: Sin límite de cantidad; el Chapter es el único juez.

items.name: Officer's Service Certificate
items.req: Haber servido un término en un cargo del Chapter, con recomendación del Chapter Advisor.
items.cost: Se pide vía el Scribe al Service & Leadership Center
items.notes: Indica cargo, término, año y Chapter.

items.name: Zerubbabel Key
items.req: Trabajo decisivo en la fundación o reinstalación de un Chapter. Hasta 3 por Chapter, dentro del año de la institución.
items.by: DeMolay International, con aprobación del Executive Officer

items.name: Medal of Heroism
items.req: Arriesgar voluntariamente la propia vida o realizar un acto heroico de sacrificio.
items.notes: Creada en 1925; menos de 50 otorgadas. Nominación: Advisory Council → Executive Officer → Grand Secretary.

items.name: Medal of Valor
items.req: Salvar o intentar salvar una vida (sin el requisito de riesgo de la propia).
items.notes: Mismo circuito de nominación que la Medal of Heroism.

items.name: Past Master Councilor's Jewel
items.req: Término sobresaliente e intachable como Master Councilor + haber conferido los dos Degrees DE MEMORIA al menos una vez en el término + una iniciación en el término.
items.cost: La paga el Chapter (única excepción a la regla de regalos)
items.by: El Chapter, con aprobación del Advisory Council
items.notes: Excepción militar: el MC llamado al servicio armado se considera en pleno cumplimiento.

items.name: PMC Meritorious Service Award (PMC-MSA)
items.req: Carta de intención en 10 días post-instalación; programa impreso y distribuido; mínimo 4 inducciones (o la cuota del EO, lo mayor); 1 actividad social + 1 cívica + 1 servicio masónico + 1 atlética + 1 fundraising; observancia pública de cada Obligatory Day; carta final con resumen.
items.notes: Solo por servicio como Master Councilor.

items.name: Distinguished Service Award (DeMolay of the Year)
items.req: Excelencia en 6 áreas: escuela, hogar, lugar de culto, comunidad, país y DeMolay, con cartas de recomendación de líderes adultos que lo evalúan en cada área.
items.notes: Establecido en 1959. Hasta 2 activos por año por Jurisdiction; conduce al DeMolay International Member of the Year.

items.name: Representative DeMolay Award (RD)
items.req: Autoevaluación en 4 campos (mental, físico, socio-económico, espiritual) con mínimo 6 meses de membresía; formulario firmado por el Chapter Advisor y el Chairman (o RD Advisor).
items.notes: "EVERY DEMOLAY IS A REPRESENTATIVE DEMOLAY!" — la máxima distinción de auto-logro. Seniors elegibles con certificado y actividad.

items.name: Chevalier
items.req: 17 años cumplidos (el EO puede autorizar 16) + 2 años de membresía activa en good standing + voto unánime del Supreme Council. Elección póstuma posible dentro de los 12 meses.
items.cost: Patent y cordon con costo; anillo opcional
items.notes: El honor más alto para un DeMolay activo. Observancia anual: 8 de noviembre. No se puede solicitar.

items.name: Squire Honor Award
items.req: Proficiencia en la Squire obligation + 6 reuniones de Manor + 2 funciones sociales + 2 Squire Applications como first-line signer + 2 eventos de servicio comunitario.
items.notes: Retroactivo a 2015 (creación de la membresía Class 9).

items.name: Master Squire's Meritorious Service Award
items.req: Carta de intención con plan aprobado; ritual del Manor de memoria; conferir una inducción; 3 reuniones conducidas; 3 nuevos miembros; 1 evento social + 1 con otra entidad DeMolay + 1 comunitario (separados); carta final en 10 días.
items.notes: Certificación contrafirmada por el Squire Mentor y el Manor Advisor.

items.name: Past Illustrious Knight Commander's MSA
items.req: Cinco etapas paralelas a las del Master Squire: cartas, ritual, al menos 3 actividades en 2+ categorías (Social, DeMolay Service, Masonic Service), cuota de membresía del EO, first-line signer de 1+ application, sillas completas en cada investiture, eScribe en 10 días.
items.notes: Certificación contrafirmada por el Priory Advisor y el Advisory Council Chairman.

items.name: Legion of Honor
items.req: Mayor de 25 años al primer día de la reunión anual + voto unánime del International Supreme Council. Confidencialidad estricta: si se rompe, el nominado no es considerado.
items.cost: Cuota al aceptar (cubre cordon y medallion); anillo opcional
items.notes: Observancia anual: 18 de marzo. Nominación online vía eScribe con voto del Advisory Council y aprobación del EO.

items.name: Honorary Legion of Honor
items.req: Master Mason mayor de 30 años con servicio excepcional y meritorio a DeMolay; sin auto-postulación; deadlines anuales en eScribe.

items.name: Senior DeMolay Anniversary Awards
items.req: Pines por aniversario de la inducción: 10, 25, 50, 60, 65, 70 y 75 años.
items.cost: Pin y certificado disponibles en el Service & Leadership Center

items.name: Medal of Appreciation
items.req: Servicio destacado a la Orden o a un Chapter, por cualquier persona mayor de 21, hombre o mujer, sin necesidad de afiliación masónica.

items.name: Advisor's Honor Key
items.req: 4 requisitos del año: Annual Report a tiempo vía eScribe + membresía neta superior al año anterior + inducciones iguales o superiores + formulario de recomendación vía eScribe.
items.notes: Solo una por Chapter por año DeMolay; estrellas por keys sucesivas. Causa común de pérdida: el Annual Report fuera de término.

items.name: Cross of Honor
items.req: Mínimo 3 años de servicio meritorio conspicuo como Advisor + voto del Supreme Council en la reunión anual.
items.notes: El máximo honor para Advisors. No se solicita.

items.name: Advisor's Service Certificate
items.req: Desde 10 años de servicio como Advisor, y luego en incrementos de 5 años.

items.name: Guild of the Leather Apron
items.req: Ser el "Advisor of the Year" de la Jurisdiction, a discreción del Executive Officer.

items.name: Founder's Cross
items.req: Oficialmente retirada: solo 135 fueron entregadas personalmente por Dad Land hasta su muerte (8 de noviembre de 1959).
items.notes: Establecida en junio de 1937. Hoy es pieza de historia DeMolay.

items.name: Grand Cross
items.req: Servicio extraordinario a DeMolay; hasta 2 personas por término del Grand Master.
items.notes: Los Past Grand Masters son portadores ex-officio.

items.name: Merit Bars
items.req: Per work category (Athletics, Civic Service, Fundraising, Membership, Ritual, etc.), each with its numeric requirement — e.g. Civic Service: 10 hrs/3 projects; Membership: 3 applications as first-line signer; Ritual: 125 points. Colors by repetition: White → Red → Blue → Purple → Gold.
items.cost: Purchased at ShopDeMolay (the Membership bar comes from DI)
items.notes: One bar worn per category; moving up a color means turning in the previous one.

items.name: Lamp of Knowledge
items.req: Complete all five Leaders Correspondence Course lessons (BeADeMolay.org/lcc). Each lesson also earns a Merit Bar.
items.notes: Show the LCC certificate to the Awards Advisor to order each bar.

items.name: Founder's Membership Award (FMA)
items.req: Be first-line signer on 5 Membership Applications.
items.notes: Senior DeMolays eligible with a Majority Certificate.

items.name: Blue Honor Key
items.req: Be first-line signer on 10 Membership Applications. A star for every additional 10.
items.notes: If you fall short before 21, you may finish it as a Senior DeMolay with your certificate.

items.name: White Honor Key
items.req: Recruit 3 new Advisors, registered and appointed by the Executive Officer. Stars for each multiple of 3.

items.name: Green Honor Key
items.req: Be first-line signer on 10 Priory applications. Stars for each multiple of 10.
items.notes: For active Priory members or Senior Knights with a certificate.

items.name: Pink Honor Key
items.req: Recruiting done by women (young or adult); policies and multiples set by the Executive Officer.

items.name: Hats Off Award
items.req: Service to the Chapter that the Active Members choose to recognize by election. Cannot be applied for.
items.notes: No limit; the Chapter is the sole judge.

items.name: Officer's Service Certificate
items.req: Having served a term in a Chapter office, with the Chapter Advisor's recommendation.
items.cost: Ordered via the Scribe from the Service & Leadership Center
items.notes: States office, term, year and Chapter.

items.name: Zerubbabel Key
items.req: Decisive work in founding or reinstating a Chapter. Up to 3 per Chapter, within a year of institution.
items.by: DeMolay International, with the Executive Officer's approval

items.name: Medal of Heroism
items.req: Voluntarily risking one's own life or performing a heroic act of sacrifice.
items.notes: Created in 1925; fewer than 50 awarded. Nomination: Advisory Council → Executive Officer → Grand Secretary.

items.name: Medal of Valor
items.req: Saving or attempting to save a life (without the self-risk requirement).
items.notes: Same nomination path as the Medal of Heroism.

items.name: Past Master Councilor's Jewel
items.req: An outstanding, blameless term as Master Councilor + having conferred both Degrees FROM MEMORY at least once during the term + one initiation in the term.
items.cost: Paid by the Chapter (the sole exception to the gift rule)
items.by: The Chapter, with Advisory Council approval
items.notes: Military exception: an MC called to armed service is considered in full compliance.

items.name: PMC Meritorious Service Award (PMC-MSA)
items.req: Letter of intent within 10 days of installation; printed, distributed program; at least 4 inductions (or the EO's quota, whichever is greater); 1 social + 1 civic + 1 Masonic service + 1 athletic + 1 fundraising activity; public observance of every Obligatory Day; final recap letter.
items.notes: Only for service as Master Councilor.

items.name: Distinguished Service Award (DeMolay of the Year)
items.req: Excellence in 6 areas: school, home, place of worship, community, country and DeMolay, with recommendation letters from adult leaders evaluating him in each area.
items.notes: Established in 1959. Up to 2 actives per year per Jurisdiction; leads to DeMolay International Member of the Year.

items.name: Representative DeMolay Award (RD)
items.req: Self-evaluation across 4 fields (mental, physical, socio-economic, spiritual) with at least 6 months of membership; form signed by the Chapter Advisor and the Chairman (or RD Advisor).
items.notes: "EVERY DEMOLAY IS A REPRESENTATIVE DEMOLAY!" — the highest self-achievement distinction. Seniors eligible with certificate and activity.

items.name: Chevalier
items.req: Age 17 (the EO may authorize 16) + 2 years of active membership in good standing + unanimous Supreme Council vote. Posthumous election possible within 12 months.
items.cost: Patent and cordon at cost; ring optional
items.notes: The highest honor for an active DeMolay. Annual observance: November 8. Cannot be applied for.

items.name: Squire Honor Award
items.req: Proficiency in the Squire obligation + 6 Manor meetings + 2 social functions + 2 Squire Applications as first-line signer + 2 community service events.
items.notes: Retroactive to 2015 (creation of Class 9 membership).

items.name: Master Squire's Meritorious Service Award
items.req: Letter of intent with an approved plan; Manor ritual from memory; confer one induction; conduct 3 meetings; induct 3 new members; 1 social + 1 with another DeMolay entity + 1 community event (separate); final letter within 10 days.
items.notes: Certification countersigned by the Squire Mentor and the Manor Advisor.

items.name: Past Illustrious Knight Commander's MSA
items.req: Five stages mirroring the Master Squire's: letters, ritual, at least 3 activities across 2+ categories (Social, DeMolay Service, Masonic Service), the EO's membership quota, first-line signer on 1+ application, full officer chairs at every investiture, eScribe within 10 days.
items.notes: Certification countersigned by the Priory Advisor and the Advisory Council Chairman.

items.name: Legion of Honor
items.req: Over 25 by the first day of the annual session + unanimous International Supreme Council vote. Strict confidentiality: if broken, the nominee is not considered.
items.cost: Fee on acceptance (covers cordon and medallion); ring optional
items.notes: Annual observance: March 18. Online nomination via eScribe with Advisory Council vote and EO approval.

items.name: Honorary Legion of Honor
items.req: A Master Mason over 30 with exceptional and meritorious service to DeMolay; no self-nomination; annual deadlines in eScribe.

items.name: Senior DeMolay Anniversary Awards
items.req: Pins for induction anniversaries: 10, 25, 50, 60, 65, 70 and 75 years.
items.cost: Pin and certificate available from the Service & Leadership Center

items.name: Medal of Appreciation
items.req: Outstanding service to the Order or a Chapter by anyone over 21, man or woman, no Masonic affiliation needed.

items.name: Advisor's Honor Key
items.req: 4 yearly requirements: Annual Report on time via eScribe + net membership above the prior year + inductions equal or better + recommendation form via eScribe.
items.notes: Only one per Chapter per DeMolay year; stars for successive keys. Most common cause of loss: a late Annual Report.

items.name: Cross of Honor
items.req: At least 3 years of conspicuous meritorious service as an Advisor + Supreme Council vote at the annual session.
items.notes: The highest honor for Advisors. Never applied for.

items.name: Advisor's Service Certificate
items.req: From 10 years of service as an Advisor, then in 5-year increments.

items.name: Guild of the Leather Apron
items.req: Being the Jurisdiction's "Advisor of the Year," at the Executive Officer's discretion.

items.name: Founder's Cross
items.req: Officially retired: only 135 were personally presented by Dad Land before his death (November 8, 1959).
items.notes: Established June 1937. Today a piece of DeMolay history.

items.name: Grand Cross
items.req: Extraordinary service to DeMolay; up to 2 individuals per Grand Master's term.
items.by: The Grand Master of DeMolay International
items.notes: Past Grand Masters are ex-officio holders.
